purpose: Maps each committed golden fixture under spec/evidence/fixtures/*.json to the mock-clockify-server route and assertion that must agree with fixture.wire. scripts/check-fixture-mock-parity.mjs boots the mock on loopback, drives served routes, and compares the responses; fixtures not served by the mock are explicitly recorded with the static assertion that covers them.

served.note: Mock embeds this invoice in state.invoices[0]; GET /invoices/{id} returns it verbatim.
Mock returns a bare state.projects array. The fixture wire is a one-element bare array; compare key set and per-key value shapes so seed ids can vary.

unservedByDesign.reason: Mock does not implement POST /time-off/requests; the {count,requests} envelope is asserted statically in scripts/check-replay-fixtures.mjs.
Mock does not implement POST /invoices/{id}/items; unitPrice /100 is asserted in scripts/check-replay-fixtures.mjs plus a source-grep tripwire.
